reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Ở đây thích anh chị chủ siêu dễ thương, hỗ trợ gọi cho check in sớm, trả xe trễ xíu cũng không sao, thuộc tuýp nhẹ nhàng, có tâm
Mn lưu tâm ở đây máy lạnh 1 chiều nên đi mùa lạnh như mình sẽ lạnh nha, đi ăn thì hơi xa tầm 8km trở lên và cách chỗ đổ xăng cũng khá xa 1 chút. Ai đi mùa ấm thì chắc ukiw hơn

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean, comfy, pretty queit at night. Very welcoming staff, perfect price.

reviews.title: Off peak ghost town
reviews.text: The hotel is great, but you should expect to grab inti central halong for food or coffee.   Room was clean, newer finishes and the bed was comfy.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great and comfortable hotel with kind staff that helped us book all of our adventures. Location is bizarre as there were no people nearby and very few restaurants. It was basically a strip of never ending empty hotels and strange European architecture. Spooky, but an interesting experience. Maybe just not the high season? Not sure, but the hotel itself is great.

reviews.title: Amazing host! Amazing room!
reviews.text:
Definitely will come here again. The host are a young couple. Great service and always checking on me to see if I need something. They offer motorcycle rentals as well as guidance for booking tours.

The room was spacious and clean. No issues with noise! Location is perfect too as it is located in the center of Ha Long.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very friendly and welcoming
reviews.negatives: There is no market or shops around.

reviews.title: A good hotel stay for family
reviews.text: The room was very spacious with 2 beds. The toilet was clean.

reviews.title: great option
reviews.positives:
everything is perfect. all the facilities are new, clean and work properly.
the staff is very friendly and helpful.
the price is quite low, so it's a good option if you are going to spend a few days in this town.

reviews.title: Here is the place for sightseeing in Halong Bay.
reviews.text: If you're looking for sightseeing in Halong, this is highly recommended. Tours from Hanoi tend to be expensive. This hotel takes care of everything, and the prices are reasonable. The staff is also very kind.

reviews.title: You can’t get better than this for the price.
reviews.positives: Beautifully clean. The staff were so friendly and helpful. This place really is lovely. The bedrooms are new and tastefully finished. The beds were comfy and linen exceptionally fresh. Loved it here.

reviews.title: Nice room, nice host.
reviews.text: The room is really nice and clean with a good price. However, the location is somewhat far from local eateries. But it is near the beach and a night beach club. The host is helpful and really nice.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff was exceptionally nice and helpful with information of restaurants cafes scooter rental and tours.

reviews.title: Recommendation
reviews.text: It's very nice to stay because it's clean, friendly, and quiet, and of course, it's great value for money. The bun cha at the nearby restaurant you recommended was also very delicious.

reviews.title: It was all good and comfy
reviews.positives: A decent place for the price.

reviews.title: Fantastic value for money
reviews.text: What a pleasant surprise. Well above our expectations for the price. 25 minute stroll into town, 10 minutes to the beach. Nice restaurants close by. I would highly recommend this hotel.

reviews.title: Highly recommended.
reviews.positives: Cozy and clean room, the hotel is located in a chillax area near the beach. The owners are very helpful. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Entering the low season.
reviews.text: I went in the winter, the amenities were almost non-existent, but the room was beautiful, and the host was friendly, which I really appreciated. The room was very spacious and worth the money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Todo en general estaba muy la ubicación, el personal, limpio, agradable y cómodo.
reviews.negatives: No hubo nada que no nos gustara

reviews.title: The room is spacious and clean. The hotel owner is friendly.
reviews.text: The hotel owners are very friendly and helpful. If anyone needs reviews on food, places to visit, etc., just ask and they will suggest everything. I was a bit shy, but they were very enthusiastic and cheerful in their support. The room is bigger than it looks in the pictures and is clean and beautiful.

reviews.title: Fugaz pero muy acogedor
reviews.positives: Solamente fuimos por unas horas ya que llegamos a las 3,30 de la madrugada. Pero llegar y ver la habitación, lo cómoda que era la cama y la ducha … fue lo mejor

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The owner is kind and takes great care. The view is average, but it's close to the beach, has basic amenities, is clean, and is inexpensive. 1 million for 3 nights and 2 days is hard to criticize. I will book again if I have a chance to visit HL again.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: El hotel es nuevo, las habitaciones son muy espaciosas, la ubicación está muy bien en una zona muy tranquila y cerca a la playa. La relación precio-calidad es excelente. Los propietarios son encantadores, muy amables y respetuosos. Nos ayudaron en todo desde que llegamos hasta que nos fuimos. Recomiendo reservar la excursión a la bahía de Ha long con ellos, ya que está muy bien y el precio es súper conveniente. Sin dudas volveríamos! Visita obligada en Ha Long

reviews.title: The older sister is relaxed and easygoing.
reviews.text: The room is quite close to the beach for walking, swimming, or playing, the shower has a slight issue and the bedside lamp too, but overall I think it's okay for the location. The room is also fine. The hotel offers motorbike rentals at reasonable prices, so everyone should book.

reviews.title: Qualité prix OK
reviews.positives: Qualité prix OK

reviews.title: The best value accommodation in Ha Long Bay.
reviews.text: We are an elderly couple from China. We stayed at the hotel for three nights. We are very satisfied with the hotel's service. Both the hotel's facilities and the attitude of the reception staff can reach full marks. Especially the service guy at the front desk. No matter what issue you have, he can solve it for you, always greeting you with a smile. This includes his other service staff. If you come to visit Ha Long Bay, I highly recommend staying at their hotel; you definitely won't regret it.

reviews.title: Hôtel charmant mais dans un environnement désertique
reviews.positives: Personnel super agréable et très jolie chambre avec balcon
reviews.negatives: L emplacement est vraiment mauvais! Il n y a absolument rien autour et la location pour un scooter que propose l hôtel pour 4h par exemple est quasi aussi cher que la nuit d hôtel !et le lit très inconfortable ( super dur ) ! Heureusement qu on n a passer que deux nuits ! Et le frigo ne marchait pas .

reviews.title: Tout etait parfait .Rapport qualité prix imbattable !!!
reviews.positives:
La gentillesse extraordinaire du personnel.
La propreté irréprochable de l'hôtel et des chambres. Les services proposés étaient top : location de scooter, voyage organisé, laverie ect... l'équipement était parfait : Literie confortable, télévision connecté, draps et serviettes blanc immaculé, bouilloire, frigo ect...
Quartier quasiment neuf donc très agréable.
Et j'insiste sur l'extrême gentillesse et le dévouement du personel : tips pour les restaurants, les points d'intérêt et la suite de notre voyage.  😍❤️  Rapport Qualité/Prix imbattable
reviews.negatives: A part le quartier un peu fantôme 👻  rien à dire sur l'hôtel en lui même....

reviews.title: The Dừa Family has stayed at the hotel for 3 days and 2 nights.
reviews.text: If I could rate it, I would give the hotel 1000 points because it is luxurious, comfortable, and clean, and the owners are extremely friendly. The hotel is close to the beach and Sunworld, making it convenient for entertainment and travel. Everyone should come and experience it!

reviews.negatives: rien

reviews.title: 2D1N at Green Bay Hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is fully furnished with basic amenities. Our team went and experienced satisfaction with the rooms, the hotel's location, and the enthusiasm of the owners. It was fantastic with support from the owners regarding restaurants, transportation, places to play, and gift shopping. This is a great choice for teams or couples looking for a retreat.

reviews.negatives: Rien a dire !

reviews.title: Merci
reviews.text:
Je suis arrivée avec 3h de retard en pleine nuit.
Malgré ça l'accueil a été chaleureux et efficace.
La chambre était très confortable, propre et conforme aux photos. 
Seul inconvénient pour moi, les voisins bruyants de la chambre mitoyenne qui malgré l'heure avancée n'avaient visiblement pas sommeil.
J'ai beaucoup apprécié le jeune homme de la réception, outre le fait qu'il soit très professionnel j'ai senti qu'il était d'une extrême gentillesse  toujours très disponible et dévoué à ce que mon séjour se passe au mieux.
Il a d'ailleurs pris ma défense contre un chauffeur Grab lors d'un différend. Je me sens très reconnaissante et le remercie grandement. Je me suis sentie épaulée et protégée.
Pour ce qui est du quartier, on trouve à se restaurer facilement et quelques échoppes également. 
L'hôtel est situé proche du port pour les excursions vers la baie d'Halong.
J'en ai d'ailleurs réservé une par l'intermédiaire du jeune homme de la réception.
Je souhaite à l'hôtel de nombreux clients aussi respectueux que son personnel

Hai vợ chồng chủ cực kì có tâm, luôn trả lời mọi thắc mắc và luôn sẳn lòng hỗ trợ, tư vấn, giúp đỡ, 10 điểm cho dịch vụ. Phòng hiện đại, giường rất êm, chất liệu dra mềm thoải mái, có điều mini bar ko hiệu quả, nhưng ko thành vấn đề gì với mẹ con tôi. Nói chung là rất thích, sẽ quay lại lần nữa.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: - thân thiện của chủ nhà

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A chị chủ vui vẻ, dễ tính, đã chia sẻ cho e rất nhiều địa điểm ăn uống và vui chơi. Phòng nghỉ rất sạch sẽ và tiện nghi. Nói chung là tuyệt vời. Có dịp quay lại vẫn sẽ chọn Green Hotel.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Отель был полупустой, потому что в  Ha Long был немного не сезон. Комната супер, все было: кондиционер, полотенца, воды каждый день бутилированная 1 штука на человека. Здесь нет стиральной машины, это отель, поэтому стирка только через службу, и вы за это будете платить дополнительно (имейте это в виду, потому что на Букинге написано, что стиралка есть). 
В отеле можно купить сразу круиз, по очень хорошей цене. До моря 10 минут пешком, все близко, но море было грязное.
reviews.negatives:
Никто не говорит нормально по английски, было немного сложно организовать стирку. 
Рядом нет магазинов либо ресторанов, до ближайшей еды 30 минут пешком минимум

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Новый чистый отель недалеко от пляжа.  Персонал отзывчивый, старается помочь. Место тихое. Неподалеку пляж. Близко до порта ( на морскую прогулку). Есть в аренду байк.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Great quality for a low price! The room is very clean, smells nice, the bed linen is white, the bed is comfy. There is a kettle and a refrigerator. Good location in a new area. Very helpful staff at the reception! They offered a tour to the bay. The guy told us where the best place to eat is, tasty and cheap and where the supermarket is (and this is kind of a problem in Halong), and told us how to get to Cat Ba Island. Very helpful, friendly people, they do not work formally, but from the heart. We liked everything very much, I definitely recommend this hotel! 

Отличное качество за низкую цену! Номер очень чистый, приятно пахнет, постельное бельё белое, кровать в меру мягкая. Есть чайник и холодильник. Хорошее расположение в новом районе. Очень отзывчивый персонал на ресепшн! Предложили тур по бухте. Парень подсказал нам, где лучшее место, чтобы поесть вкусно и недорого и где супермаркет(а в Халонге это проблема), и рассказал как добраться на остров Катба. Очень добрые, дружелюбные люди, не формально работают, а с душой. Нам все очень понравилось, рекомендую этот отель однозначно!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Хороший чистый номер 👍

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Тихо и уютно!. Персонал хороший.
reviews.negatives: Нет такого.

reviews.title: Всё было отлично!
reviews.positives: Мне очень понравилось проживание в этом отеле. Дружелюбный персонал, который всегда помогал. Парень на стойке регистрации предложил экскурсию, на которую мы с сестрой ездили на день. В номере было чисто и уютно как дома😌 Очень советую останавливаться здесь!!!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Obsługa bardzo miła , czysta delikatnie pachnąca pościel i ręczniki . Spokojna ulica .

reviews.title: Romantyczny pobyt we dwoje
reviews.positives:
Lokalizacja 
Wielkość pokoju 
Cena
Czystość 
Personel
reviews.negatives: Pogoda

reviews.title: Świetny hotel
reviews.positives: Bardzo spokojna okolica, blisko na market i do centrum. W okolicy dużo restauracji. Obsługa miła i pomocna, korzystaliśmy z organizacji wycieczki nad Zatokę oraz taksówkę na drogę powrotną do Hanoi. Panowie w recepcji super mówią po angielsku, to była przyjemność tutaj przyjechać :) bardzo dziękujemy!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Čisté, hezké, nové ubytování, milý personál, uschovali mi zavazadla po checkoutu, všechno bylo super😊

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Too noisy at night, the sound of TV beside my room is so clear and loud.

reviews.title: For a really budget accommodation it was amazing!
reviews.positives: Exceptional value for money.  Met our needs on a last minute booking before flying out to Da Nang and was the cheapest place we stayed in our 18 nights.
reviews.negatives: Nothing. Everything met our needs.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: hotel was lovely, clean, spacious, and great value for money. Staff were lovely too
reviews.negatives: not a fault of the hotel, but Ha Long is a ghost town, there are streets and streets of empty hotels and it's quite eerie. There are not a lot of food/drink options close by, you have to do about a 40 min walk to find options and even then they are not great. Something to consider when coming to Ha Long. This hotel however is lovely

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Clean
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Quiet but modern hotel
reviews.positives: It was very modern and clean. The room was spacious and the facilities were good.
reviews.negatives: It wasn’t a busy area so there weren’t many places to eat.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Not sure why it has „green“ in their name. Seems more like a normal Hotel in a kind of ghost town area that uses it for greenwashing. For example a basic thing to avoid plastic by providing a water dispenser does not exist - I had to buy water in plastic bottles. There are of course many other ways for improvements to reduce the impact.

reviews.title: Great stay at low cost!
reviews.positives: Great hotel! Really good for price and close to the beach; let us leave luggage early and room/ bed is huge!
reviews.negatives: Nothing :)

reviews.title: The hotel was very good but Halong Bay was a spooky ghost town with many empty buildings.
reviews.positives: The young man at the front desk "Son" was very pleasant. His spoken English was not the best but he was tech savvy and could easily translate any written English and text messages. I was only in Halong Bay enroute to Mong Cai. Son gave me a wake up call and then a 10 minute warning that the shuttle bus was arriving early. He also spoke to the driver to make sure that we would be dropped off right at the border gate.  Very low cost for the room.
reviews.negatives: The elevator made a very LOUD "ding dong" and could be heard on every floor. Please tone down the speaker. A complimentary coffee sachet in the room would have been nice because Halong Bay is a ghost town with minimal open shops. No mention of the services offered by the hotel. Does the hotel sell instant noodles? A simple price list in the room would help.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
One of the cheapest places in the area
Spacious and clean room
Good security
reviews.negatives: Facilities are a bit old

reviews.title: Would definitely recommend just nothing to do in the area
reviews.positives: Very modern and clean, the staff are very lovely! Get way more than expected for the cost, shame about how quiet it is.
reviews.negatives: The area is a ghost town, we had to order food for delivery which also took a while to come. Had a local who neighboured us who played music very loudly, nothing down to the hotel though.

reviews.title: Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.positives: Good location

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.positives: Amazing for the price! And the Host was really helpful.
reviews.negatives: Not a fault of the hotel, but we came in January and the surrounding area was quite empty!

reviews.title: Amazing bang for the buck!
reviews.positives: Super clean, everything you need for a quick sleep after arriving at Ha Long from a sleeper bus early in the morning.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The price is reasonable for a comfortable and big room. The facilities are equipped. The staff was friendly and helped me book the Halong Bay tour and the van to Hanoi.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives: Good size room, good wifi. Very close to a very good beach with an amazing sunset. Reception staff booked a very nice limousine bus for us at a good price. Good price for a nice room
reviews.negatives:
It would be nice to have a Reel fridge, there is a cooler now but every time you go out it gets warm. 
2 chairs to sit would be great.

Only very few option to eat or get coffee around the hotel. At least 4 of them were closed when we were there.

reviews.title: Good place
reviews.positives: The hotel is very modern with new facilities. The room were clean and spacious. Both check-in and checkout processes were smooth and easy. However, the location is not ideal; there are only a few cafes and grocery stores nearby. It takes 15-20 minutes on foot to reach the busier areas, while the beach is a 10-minute walk away. The room was reasonably priced.
reviews.negatives:
The AC did not provide heating, which was inconvenient as the weather was a bit chilly. 
The bed was squeaky.

reviews.title: Great place, of amazing value!
reviews.positives: Room comfort, cleanliness, and value
reviews.negatives: The location doesn't feel 'local', but that's my personal taste.

reviews.title: Perfect and clean
reviews.positives:
Lovely reception guy. Helpful so much!

Clean rooms, a lot of towels and even was offered fresh towel everyday if required.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: Awesome room.  Spacious.  Clean.  Comfortable beds.  We got free water bottles.  We arranged a laundry service with the hotel which was nice.
reviews.negatives: The neighborhood is under construction, and very few restaurants were opened.  We had to walk about 20 min to get to another neighborhood to get something to eat.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: It was perfect! Modern and comfortable room, much needed after trekking everywhere. Nice location close to the beach.
reviews.negatives: No breakfast but marts close by and restaurants when you go towards the main beach.

reviews.title: Clean and nice stay
reviews.positives: Great stay

reviews.title: The hotel itself can’t fault and the staff was extremely friendly and helpful. Unfortunately there’s actually not much t
reviews.positives: Really nice and big rooms. Really kind staff and so helpful.
reviews.negatives: The area wasn’t great. Ha long is a ghost town so had to get a grab to get any food and there is nothing to do.

reviews.title: Room was great, has all what is needed for a proper stay. Really good deal for the money we paid! Book this stay, you wo
reviews.positives: Room, staff, neighborhood.
reviews.negatives: All good! Toilet door was a bit squeaky.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The staff at this hotel were exceptional. The hotel is beautiful and in a great location

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very kind to allow us a late check-in at 3am since we arrived in Ha Long by night bus. Room super clean, bed comfortable, staff very friendly. A stay here can be fully recommend.

reviews.title: Highly recommended
reviews.positives: The value for money is unbeatable. The operators were super nice and helpful.

reviews.title: Great Value for money and clean
reviews.positives: I gave it a 10 because … would we come back , the answer is yes.  It has its faults but the room was clean, bed was comfortable . It was the cheapest accommodation we have stayed in Vietnam and presented excellent value. The nearby beach is beautiful. Staff friendly, Communication easiest through whatsapp and google translate. If you don’t like walking there are many buggies ( big golf carts) to pick you up.
reviews.negatives:
It is about 15 mins walk from restaurants, but not a problem for is.
The whole area is a bit of a ghost town but with an eerie charm

reviews.title: Recommend but get motorbike
reviews.positives: The best thing I liked about this place is they had motorbike to rent direct through them and the owners were absolutely helpful with everything arranging bus to Hanoi.Washing clothes.And always had a smile on there face.
reviews.negatives: It's quite a new suberb so not many restaurants available.And no coffee in the room considering nothing around so coffee would of been good in room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great value for money, very helpful staff! Booked for us lots of things 👍🏻

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Modern, comfortable, spacious room, quiet, was perfect !
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: The receptionist was very helpful in booking us our tour of ha long bay and suggesting places to eat as there was not many restaurants open in the area. Rooms were spotlessly clean and very comfortable

reviews.title: Had a great stay and will definitely come back ! Room was very spacious, clean with all amenities available ! The staff
reviews.positives: The room was spacious, very clean and great money value !
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nice view
reviews.negatives: Pillows were not good

reviews.title: Perfect !
reviews.positives: This little hotel is the best we had so far in 10 days ! Very clean, the beds were really comfortable, we had everything we needed in the room and the host was really helpful on every point. He recommend the perfect place to eat, not expensive at all and good Vietnamese food ! 10 stars for this place !
reviews.negatives: Nothing !

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great spot and views friendly staff where really helpful would definitely recommend
